question_text: Which of the following would increase the moment produced by a force?

options.label: B
options.text: Moving the pivot closer to the force

options.label: C
options.text: Applying the force parallel to the lever

options.label: D
options.text: Reducing the length of the lever arm

explanation: Moment increases when either the force increases or the perpendicular distance from the pivot increases. Moving the pivot closer to the force means the distance increases, so the moment increases.
